description_cn: 使一组点共球。将多点拉回至一个拟合球上。共球约束，使多个点保持在同一个球面上。
description_en: Make a set of points congruent to a sphere. Pull multiple points back onto a fitted sphere.

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
